chunks.title: The Burning Bush
chunks.reason: Describes the initial appearance of God in the bush and Moses' reaction to the holy ground.

chunks.title: God's Call and Commission
chunks.reason: Contains God declaring His purpose for Israel and Moses questioning his suitability.

chunks.title: The Divine Name and Instructions
chunks.reason: Covers the revelation of God's name and detailed instructions for Moses to deliver to the elders and Pharaoh.
